findings.description: 382MB VRAM stuck on both GPUs after del and torch.cuda.empty_cache(). 47% of loaded VRAM did not clear.
NVML reports 0% memory utilization while 425MB remains allocated. Monitoring tools cannot see residual VRAM.
In multi-tenant cloud environments next tenant could access residual VRAM data from previous workload. 382MB of previous tenant data persists invisibly.
Both GPUs show exactly 425MB residual — systematic not random. Driver or CUDA runtime retaining memory.

conclusion: VRAM does not fully clear after process exit on A100 SXM. 382MB residual confirmed on both GPUs. NVML blind to residual. Security risk in multi-tenant environments.
